title: Create: Vanilla Reimagined
body:
![Create vanilla minecraft style blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddc36b3d350b7857b21d72266ce13110f4871693.png)

Create vanilla reimagined is a texture pack that rework some utility blocks in vanilla Minecraft to make them look and match the create mod style

- This texure pack is made for create mod
- More blocks will be added soon
- More mods will be supported in other packs! check my profile always
